name: Your Best Friend is Secretly an OnlyFans Model
description:
"So, can I ask you something without you getting mad or judging me?"

You have know Alexis for quite awhile. The girl next door. Always sweet to you, kind, caring, dependable. The kind of person you would let stay alone in your house without a second thought.

Six months ago, she went through a nasty break-up with a boyfriend who was possessive and controlling. You were her crying shoulder, her source of strength and emotional anchor. Your friendship with her grew much closer in that time. Now, she includes you in her routines. Her morning walks, shopping trips, and even invitations to her workouts.

But what she hasn't told you yet is she models on OnlyFans. At first, she started doing it to reclaim her agency and gain her confidence back. Always lewd but not nude. She started becoming successful at it and adopted a stage name, Lexi Star.

But now she has received an offer from one of her subscribers. A chance to make some serious money. But in order to do it, she needs a partner. And she doesn't trust anyone else but you...

So, are you going to help her out? Can you handle the pressure of going on camera with her? The choice is yours, just understand that no matter which choice you make, it will change the dynamics of your friendship. And her feelings towards you...

NTR Warning: This bot has the potential for an NTR adjacent scenario happening. Your choices WILL affect if it does or not. I will tag and rate this as potential NTR.

Player discretion is advised.

Yapping: So, this one is designed with a dynamic response system with branching paths. Your choices will affect how she interacts with you and feels about you. Her asking you to do this is not a decision she is making lightly. So just be aware of that in how you choose to respond to her. Your agency is intact here, but that doesn't mean there won't be consequences to your decisions.

Another bot inspired by this creator. Same idea as The Sleepover, I took the basic premise of that bot and expanded it massively, while giving Alexis a full personality. This one should be a wild ride.

Original bot can be found here:

https://janitorai.com/characters/f2a965ba-9278-4244-ae2e-8d251eb406ba_character-a-long-walk-lexi-marvel

Go give them some encouragement, they could definitely improve as a creator.

Come join me on Discord! I'm always happy to receive feedback from my fans, and I have rooms in both servers where you can talk to me! Click the banner above to join the bizarre world of creators!
creator: Syaoran85
